sections.headline: Design matters
sections.subheadline: I create digital experiences with intention and restraint.

sections.body:
I believe in the power of subtraction. Every element should earn its place. Every pixel should serve a purpose. This philosophy guides everything I create—from brand identities to digital products.

Based in San Francisco, I work with companies who value craft over trends, substance over style, and long-term thinking over quick wins.

items.title: Stripe Design System
items.description: Led the redesign of Stripe's component library, focusing on accessibility and developer experience.

items.title: Linear Brand Identity
items.description: Created the visual identity for Linear, including logo, typography system, and brand guidelines.

items.title: Vercel Website
items.description: Redesigned Vercel's marketing site with focus on performance and developer experience.
